narrative:
Hubbard City 2B (precinct in Trumbull County) has 834 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 23.6 percentage points.
